name: iabloko
description: Unity-focused skill packs for Claude Code

plugins.name: unity-skills
plugins.description: Unity-focused skills for Claude Code: conventions, architecture (Zenject/VContainer), UniTask async, uGUI/TMP UI, testing (Unity Test Framework + headless CLI runner), performance, Addressables, DOTween Pro, UniRx, editor scripting (Odin), and LeoEcsLite ECS (conventions, systems/DI, testing, performance).
